concept: Blast direcional com spark branco, três lâminas âmbar em arco, borda ciano e dissipação para o ponto inicial.
selectionRationale: VFX de explosão direcional novo, diferente do smoke loop, core flare e cinder burst radiais; pode comunicar cone de explosão/knockback sem alterar regras ou runtime.
prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: high-resolution 2D sprite-sheet source for a Bomba PvP bomb/explosion VFX. Primary request: create a coherent 4x4 storyboard grid with 16 sequential frames of a directional bomb arc blast: a compact white-hot detonation point appears at the left side of each centered cell, three to five amber-orange crescent blades fan outward toward the right, a cyan inner edge and thin red-orange shock arc follow them, the burst reaches a sharp bright peak, then the blades dissolve and the spark returns to the compact point. Each cell must contain exactly one centered frame with generous padding and identical framing, crisp readable pixel-art explosion silhouette, no text and no UI. Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background, no floor, no shadow, no gradient, no texture. Subject: isolated directional blast made of curved energy blades and a compact detonation core. Style/medium: crisp high-resolution pixel-art game VFX with limited white, amber-orange, cyan, red-orange and deep-navy accents, hard readable edges with restrained glow. Composition/framing: square 4x4 grid, row-major temporal order, centered effect in every cell, consistent scale, 16 distinct smoothly progressing frames. Lighting/mood: forceful tactical detonation, readable at small runtime size. Color palette: white-hot spark, amber blades, cyan inner edge, orange-red arc, navy accents; never use magenta in the subject. Materials/textures: sharp crescent fragments, curved shock strokes and compact pixel clusters. Constraints: keep the chroma-key background perfectly uniform; preserve a full transparent-safe margin around every frame; no text, logos, watermark, characters, smoke plume, fireball cloud, radial eight-way burst, bomb body or scenery. Avoid: duplicate frames, cut-off blades, empty cells, circular-only explosion, messy smoke and inconsistent framing.

source.resolutionNote: A geração entregue pelo image_gen é nativa em 1254x1254; source-upscaled-2048.png é somente um derivado ampliado e não uma fonte nativa 2048px.

pipeline.alphaProcessing: Helper remove_chroma_key.py com auto-key de borda, soft matte, despill e edge-contract 1; depois recorte interno de 40px e extensão transparente centralizada para impedir contato com as bordas.

grok.requestedTask: Conferir a grade 4x4, tentar extrair frames e validar alpha, ordem, timing e bordas internas.
grok.result: Invoke-GrokWorker.ps1 retornou exit code 1 após a mensagem inicial e não criou arquivos.

pipeline.fallback: Extração, atlases, contact sheet, GIF e validação concluídos localmente com ImageMagick após a remoção de halo pelo helper.

validation.visualInspection: Contact sheet inspecionado após a remoção de chroma-key; spark, lâminas, arco, dissipação e retorno permanecem legíveis sem halo magenta observável.

license: Visual gerado nesta thread; nenhum recurso externo ou pack adotado.
